## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new POC and align on content workflow and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vivek Shankar is now the primary GrowthX POC for Sunbit, replacing Ehtisham Hussain.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [A content backlog of \~140 articles is delaying publishing; Angel will prioritize clearing it.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Organic traffic dipped this week after a strong mid-November run; the trend will be monitored.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Two workflow questions for Jason (B2C legal review, case study context) are blocking progress and require his input.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow & Backlog

  - [**Problem:** A backlog of \~140 articles is delaying publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Sunbit's Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Angel will prioritize publishing existing articles, now that social content is scheduled.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Next, Angel will submit "Ready to Review" articles to legal, pending Jason's guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Legal team bandwidth is limited during the busy holiday season.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [Continue delivering 25-article batches, including 5 AEO pages per batch.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
      - [Front-load work to maintain delivery through the end-of-year holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)

### Workflow Blockers for Jason

  - [**B2C Legal Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [**Question:** Do B2C articles (dental/auto costs) require the same legal review as B2B content?](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A streamlined B2C workflow would accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**Case Study Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Request:** Add a "context" column to the case study spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This would provide background on customer challenges, enabling richer narratives beyond just performance stats.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Organic Traffic Performance

  - [**Trend:** Organic traffic dipped this week after a strong two-week run in mid-November.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [**Last Week of Nov:** 394 sessions, 348 active users.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [**Mid-Nov Peak:** Sessions and active users increased by \>100.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Early Nov Baseline:** 377 sessions, 351 active users.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Action:** Monitor the trend in December to determine if the dip is an anomaly or a new pattern.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Team Updates

  - [**POC Transition:** Vivek Shankar is now the primary GrowthX POC. Ehtisham Hussain will continue managing content production.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Next Sync:** The team will sync via Slack next week, as Jason is at a conference.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ehtisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [Move 25 articles to "Ready to Review" by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [Post workflow questions for Jason in the Slack group.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [**Angel:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Publish existing articles to clear the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Consult Jason on the legal review process for B2C content.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Sync via Slack next week instead of a live meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/cyMk1ax6JK3x2yKCmpFaWfyzQerH9C3B?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
